## What does this PR do?
<!-- A short summary in 1–3 sentences. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Typo / spelling / grammar
- [ ] Broken link / DOI correction
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Visual polish (within existing design tokens)
- [ ] New page or major content addition (opened an issue first)
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My changes are scoped — one logical change per PR.
- [ ] I have not added publications, talks, grants, or affiliations not
      already supported by the repository or CV.
- [ ] No hard-coded colours; I used the CSS variables in `:root`.
- [ ] The page still works in both light and dark mode.
- [ ] Internal links still resolve.
- [ ] I agree to license code contributions under MIT and content
      contributions under CC-BY-4.0.
